steps.name: Create SessionList accordion component
steps.criteria: renders one card per session showing date and exercise count; clicking a session expands to show its entries; only one session expanded at a time; clicking again collapses; empty state shown when no sessions
steps.implementation_notes: New component SessionList. Props: sessions: SessionRow[] (import type from ExerciseHistory), isOffline: boolean, lastSyncedAt?: Date. Internal state: expandedId: string | null. Each session card shows: date (loggedAt.toLocaleDateString()), '{N} exercise{s}' count, chevron icon (▼/▶ or CSS rotation). Clicking toggles expandedId. When expanded, shows entries: exerciseName, sets x reps, formQuality (or dash). Reuse SessionRow type exported from ExerciseHistory.tsx. BEM: session-list, session-list__card, session-list__card--expanded, session-list__header, session-list__entry, session-list__count, session-list__chevron. Add CSS to history.css.

steps.name: Replace ExerciseHistory with SessionList in HistoryPage
steps.criteria: HistoryPage renders SessionList instead of ExerciseHistory; offline banner still shown; session data flows from useExerciseHistory to SessionList unchanged; ExerciseHistory component file kept intact
steps.implementation_notes: In main.tsx HistoryPage function: add import for SessionList. Replace <ExerciseHistory ... /> with <SessionList sessions={sessions} isOffline={isOffline} lastSyncedAt={lastSyncedAt ?? undefined} />. Keep ExerciseHistory import only if used elsewhere; remove from HistoryPage render. The sessions prop shape (SessionRow[]) is already compatible since Session satisfies SessionRow.
